mean_reversion._comment: Mean reversion causes growth rates to decay toward terminal growth. lambda controls speed: 0.1=slow (reaches terminal ~year 10), 0.25=moderate (~year 4), 0.5=fast (~year 2). Set enabled=false for constant growth (legacy behavior).

erp._comment_mode: Options: 'static' (Damodaran, from equity_risk_premiums.json) or 'dynamic' (VIX-adjusted). Dynamic mode fetches current VIX and adjusts base ERP: ERP_dynamic = ERP_base × (VIX/VIX_mean)^sensitivity.
erp._comment_vix: VIX historical mean ~19.5. Sensitivity 0.3-0.5 typical. Higher sensitivity = more reactive to VIX changes. Example: VIX=30, mean=20, sens=0.4 → adjustment=1.18 (18% higher ERP).
